title: 36 Brite Pegs
features: Large, sturdy pegs securely holds washing on the line
Durable and long lasting with rust resistant coils
description: From the manufacturer Minky Homecare Established in the UK in 1941, Minky Homecare are world leaders in laundry hardware and textile manufacture. Minky is the UK’s leading brand in the laundry market, with Minky ironing boards and covers found in over 70% of UK homes. We are the proud holders of both the Royal Warrant, granted as supplier of premium quality products to the Royal Household, and the Princes Warrant, awarded for product excellence and a commitment to the environment. Minky Brite Pegs 36 colourful clothes pegs Minky Brite pegs are sure to brighten up your washing line with their fresh, contemporary colours. Brite Pegs securely grip washing onto the line due to their large, sturdy design and ensure that your washing stays on the line even in the windiest weather conditions. Made from UV stable plastic and rust resistant coils the Brite pegs are durable and long lasting in all-weather conditions. The large 36 pack of Brite pegs will ensure that you can hang out an entire wash load and more!! Large, sturdy pegs securely hold washing on the line Durable and long lasting with rust resistant coils Large Size - 8cm Vibrant and colourful to brighten up your washing line
